GpuProjectExec: expr=[brand_id@0 as brand_id, brand@1 as brand, t_hour@2 as t_hour, t_minute@3 as t_minute, ext_price@4 as ext_price]
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [ext_price@4 DESC, i_brand_id@5 ASC, t_hour@2 ASC]
    GpuSortExec: expr=[ext_price@4 DESC, i_brand_id@5 ASC, t_hour@2 ASC]
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[i_brand_id@1 as brand_id, i_brand@0 as brand, t_hour@2 as t_hour, t_minute@3 as t_minute, sum(tmp.ext_price)@4 as ext_price, i_brand_id@1 as i_brand_id]
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_brand, i_brand_id, t_hour, t_minute], aggr=[sum(tmp.ext_price)]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_brand@0, i_brand_id@1, t_hour@2, t_minute@3], 8), input_partitions=8
              GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_brand, i_brand_id, t_hour, t_minute], aggr=[sum(tmp.ext_price)]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(time_sk@3, t_time_sk@0)], projection=[0, 1, 2, 5, 6]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([time_sk@3], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, sold_item_sk@1)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 5]
                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                                  GpuFilterExec: predicate=i_manager_id@3 = 1, projection=[0, 1, 2]
                                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=5592405
                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([sold_item_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=24
                                GpuUnionExec
                                  GpuProjectExec: expr=[ws_ext_sales_price@2 as ext_price, ws_item_sk@1 as sold_item_sk, ws_sold_time_sk@0 as time_sk]
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                                      GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ws_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[2, 3, 4]
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                                              GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_moy@2 = 11 AND d_year@1 = 1999, projection=[0]
                                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=5592405
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ws_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                            GpuScanExec: batch_size=5592405
                                  GpuProjectExec: expr=[cs_ext_sales_price@2 as ext_price, cs_item_sk@1 as sold_item_sk, cs_sold_time_sk@0 as time_sk]

                                      GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, cs_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[2, 3, 4]
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                                              GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_moy@2 = 11 AND d_year@1 = 1999, projection=[0]

                                  GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_ext_sales_price@2 as ext_price, ss_item_sk@1 as sold_item_sk, ss_sold_time_sk@0 as time_sk]

                                      GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ss_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[2, 3, 4]
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405

                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5592405
                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=t_meal_time@3 = breakfast OR t_meal_time@3 = dinner, projection=[0, 1, 2]

                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=5592405
--- memory ---
GpuProjectExec: row_width=60, subtree_max_row_bytes=384
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=384
    GpuSortExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=384
      GpuProjectExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=372

          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=60, subtree_max_row_bytes=360
